author: aaronczichon
description: Renders an mapbox location image based on given coordinates.

manifest.author: Aaron Czichon
manifest.description: Show a map inside your notes with a specific format.
manifest.name: Mapbox Location Image

name: Mapbox Location Image

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- **dataview**: adding support for data view variables [#55](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/55) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b8987c79dac5e584fa83f19d6a2a3481aba88878))
- **multi-marker**: adding support for multi markers for image and interactive map [#56](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/56) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b67fc3f37202e58d0b31df8a74fdf1be158f2eda))

## Documentation
- **dataview**: added documentation page for dataview plugin support [#55](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/55) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/5f06dedb72aaf61529dceeb8e463ec05782b848b))
- **changelog**: updated changelog [#56](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/56) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/c861a01116cda2c3506295caaeb6465c2bceb834))

## Chores
- fix vulnerabilities [#55](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/55) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/bc341e882cfe615bd15c6c453530b2daa1c237e4))
- update node engine to at least 20 [#57](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/57) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/94309e564836305f09ed9b59b3b6e29b75af3cc2))
- formatting [#57](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/57) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/11f6ba5ca64c46634d14752b980a0a66d63008a3))

releases.description:
## Features
- added support for multiple coordinates [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/a1c6d7a02a737578cb0b23b636064abc6999142e))
- fix for typing [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/f4488cf46a0343765fee53b62565304f44aa213f))
- made new code block available [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/5638518186dbe40846979ba73b16b179ebcc821f))
- added docusaurs instance [#40](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/40) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/7ff1135a674129c3be410fb792804dfeb8856476))
- added v1 documentation to docusaurs [#40](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/40) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/46171d4015d2666a406a03b2da16af405208632c))
- added first command to add location from clipboard [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/4b9e3df826170bf398381d3b3c133f8a28c2c55a))
- added commands for marker size and reverse order [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/1cb40f8088f113293341a8e306962c7de6b85ba6))
- added command to update marker size with modal [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/362e64f1ef24d24694f61c9951499194803a8aa4))
- added command to update API token [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/4918854b833e3658ca25ec51980f8bceaa9809e1))
- added command to update default map style [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b9bda0a72ad65f511d80fcd8794dfb4defa6bbdf))
- added command to update default marker color, marker size and custom marker URL [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/58d78617da1df74a2e7e715d25bf203ad17caed6))
- first PoC of interactive map support [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/92bbd5740188159493d80e7982814604ee4927ba))
- added support for maki icons on interactive map [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b70b4134ce0f483153f3426862b37bc619908dfb))

## Bug Fixes
- exclude documentation from plugin build [#40](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/40) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/274716d4c0fd723b6e574625ed480cb41f109cd8))
- resolved an issue where interactive map has wrong render context [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/fc7b1163181c6fcd275bf0fa958b4880a4813e9b))

## Documentation
- changelog update [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b4f5ecf2478254980bf262a0a53bf4f8ff7f857f))

- updated readme.md file [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/e407bb1d5f099b0b60192d8c7706703ab5accf32))
- update changelog [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/a06bc3cf0c50e4918e0756214ce6bcffaf68265d))
- improved documentation website [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/026b1028d0c6b97300a2bfb50dc0987111d0bb2a))
- updated changelog and versions [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/03bc8f50cfa68ffff93e5709d1157f31ee65c7ad))
- removed dev warning [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/52d47a24524f7cd18215e283ae7d594397c0e0b5))
- updated docusaurus dependencies [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/8f380a407ed47c1fd876c21ee4c8e428c351274f))

## Code Refactoring
- removed unused parameters for static image container [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/b6e8261c915df3cb742f56b644e54016075cb89c))

## Continuous Integration
- added feature/v2 branch to build validation [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/03dc3ee2a8bc122b65e28cc49516769a3761d21b))
- added Github codeowners file [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/0b6b2d04101f1401853f837a4306ff79e8372799))

- updated release workflow to automatically increment versions on main branch [#43](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/43) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/93f7478a91f4722fbaa267fa7628dcade8801a42))

## Chores
- improved code structure for new processors [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/5801cd45a2e567f8d2fadf7c86644d9dd69e4b3c))
- switched to unified format styles [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/394f8446d85199fef75903bc58665b2c246b0270))
- removed file [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/d82c907a03ebed02a239860620dcf773ffa71444))
- improved token check on plugin load, improved typings [#38](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/38) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/904ff5b4b5010715f4acd84ae6b9c97efed00b02))
- structure update to reuse created settings for modals [#41](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/41) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/7701d3ed8e23b702c60ad7779e8b3e074d1f8436))
- under development hint for docs [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/fc1a14b9f275f1f7fbf463612627766a290e4535))
- resolved issue with version bump [#45](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/45) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/e9aa7d11e5361f778d48aee85c33567047ef7e22))

## Commits
- 39b3651: Merge branch 'feature/v2' into feature/interactive-map-support (Aaron Czichon) [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42)
- a25da12: Merge branch 'feature/v2' into feature/interactive-map-support (Aaron Czichon) [#42](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/42)
- 84b6b3b: Merge branch 'main' into feature/v2 (Aaron Czichon) [#44](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/44)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- added support for searches from within code block [#33](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/33) ([nehnehneh](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/61eee60466b911cdb25c36f87dbfe8dae13b2376))
- fix issue with custom marker icon not being displayed correctly [#35](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/35) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/ee95e92affe2c183d8cd9856f1e84e4236a9d6dd))
- added new coordinate syntax [#35](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/35) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/af50009405b7699e12bfe79e924768b03e5bf572))
- added reverse coordinates toggle in settings [#35](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/35) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/acaa3526fd7597352d06711600edc6577037304d))

## Bug Fixes
- fixed markdown issues [#33](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/33) ([nehnehneh](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/52379d7a6d2469edc844f5479fdf24b5ac52b6af))
- fixed markdown issues [#33](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/33) ([nehnehneh](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/cc8420b842f21042e3ad0fea74a54259cb48072f))

## Documentation
- extracted data privacy into it's own file [#32](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/32) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/8d7c0096c82e3c7f0e9140762a86470b2c81b4b3))
- croped image [#32](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/32) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/bbd095a406087cb25893fd0eb43fd04bf6effbfe))
- added status badge [#32](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/32) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/0a797d4aadba5d6d8040a63f0687c5d6b846a241))
- updated status badge ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/00afb38426c2346bfa2382c4dbea1582713c7da7))
- updating changelog [#34](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/34) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/1ea5d9cfeb2f36e30d6dfcc212cc747ecaf913bc))
- update changelog with release dates [#34](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/34) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/ee1d9f8ac8106b7b03e18a219963806c062ddcc4))
- documentation update [#35](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/35) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/a685dd439a6899636dc0fc35c0818cf5cb361c65))
- updated changelog with release date ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/67aab425d68be5db323ce03be7d07ee435240ae4))

## Continuous Integration
- rename and update to workflow [#32](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/32) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/e24e1269cbc222eafd6d165e046c298b8c110c83))

- remove commit lint [#34](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/34) ([Aaron Czichon](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/commit/e7531c3e043fe223007122c25a38378b11d0bfe9))

- 5b7de80: Update README.md (nehnehneh) [#33](https://github.com/aaronczichon/obsidian-location-plugin/pull/33)

releases.description:
